innateAbility.name: Runic Infusion
innateAbility.description: Grants permanent strength, agility, and intelligence per Power Rune activated by The Self and The Double.

abilities.name: Flux
abilities.description: Deals damage over time on the unit-targeted enemy.The damage is not applied if another enemy unit is near the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Magnetic Field
abilities.description: Grants allied units absolute evasion and attack speed bonus within the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Spark Wraith
abilities.description: Summons a Spark Wraith that activates after an effect delay.Once an enemy is within its search radius, the wraith fuses itself with the target.

abilities.name: Tempest Double
abilities.description: The Self creates a perfect duplication of itself which is considered a hero by most abilities.The Double can use all of The Self's current items and non-ultimate spells, except most consumables and items that would drop on death.The Double has a separate and independent item and ability cooldowns.

abilities.name: Clone Inventory
abilities.description: The Double neither can pick up, nor drop items. However, it can utilize item abilities within its inventory with each item having an independent cooldown of The Self's.Upon each cast, The Double's inventory is updated based on The Self's. This sets all items' attributes as well.Does not copy muted items in The Self's inventory.
